common.uiScaffold: UI scaffold only. Business logic is intentionally deferred to the next step.
common.searchPlaceholder: Search credentials, systems, users, or tags

home.title: Home Dashboard
home.subtitle: Quick operational view of your vault health, activity, and trust signals.

create.title: Create your master password
create.subtitle: Set the one password that protects your team vault. Keep it strong and private.
create.helper: We only store a secure hash of this password. It cannot be recovered later.
create.warning: If you lose this password, vault data cannot be decrypted in later phases.

unlock.title: Unlock your team vault
unlock.description: Enter your master password to access your secure data
unlock.subtitle: Access shared credentials for cloud tools, client portals, and internal systems in one trusted workspace.
unlock.helper: Enter your master password to unlock an in-memory encryption session.

errors.passwordTooShort: Master password must be at least 12 characters.
errors.passwordTooWeak: Use a stronger password with mixed characters.
errors.alreadyInitialized: Vault is already initialized. Use unlock instead.
errors.setupRequired: Vault setup is required before unlock.
errors.databaseUnavailable: Storage is not ready yet. Run `npm run prisma:push` and try again.
errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

trustItems.audit: Audit-ready event model for security timeline

vault.title: Vault Overview
vault.subtitle: Daily workspace for operations and admin teams managing shared credentials.
vault.newSubtitle: Create a secure credential with encrypted secret fields and structured tags.
vault.detailSubtitle: Update access details, rotate passwords, and keep metadata clean.
vault.searchPlaceholder: Search by service, username, URL, notes, or tags

empty.title: Your vault is ready for the first credential
empty.description: Add your first shared account, generate a strong password, and organize credentials with tags for fast team lookup.
empty.secondaryHint: Need a quick walkthrough? Load secure demo entries and explore the full experience.
empty.tipGenerator: Use the built-in generator to create strong passwords in one click.
empty.tipTags: Use tags like IT, Sales, or Clients to keep team access organized.

demo.loaded: Demo data loaded. Your vault is ready.

list.noMatches: No credentials match your current search and filters.

warnings.missingUrl: No URL linked to this credential

errors.unlockRequired: Vault is locked. Unlock to continue.
errors.decryptFailed: Could not decrypt credential data. Unlock again.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete credential?
deleteConfirm.description: This removes the credential record from your vault.

form.helper: Sensitive fields are encrypted in the browser before they are saved.

errors.vaultMissing: Vault session was not found. Unlock again.

insights.title: Security Health / Vault Insights
insights.subtitle: Reuse and weak-password indicators are computed only while the vault is unlocked.

vaultNew.title: Add Credential
vaultNew.subtitle: Create a structured credential prepared for encryption and lifecycle controls.
vaultNew.helper: Credential persistence is intentionally not connected yet.

securityPanelItems.noPlainText: No plain-text password rendering in list views

vaultDetail.title: Credential Details
vaultDetail.subtitle: Prepared edit and activity structure for future secure credential lifecycle.
vaultDetail.activityEmpty: Timeline appears after CRUD + audit tracking is connected.
vaultDetail.securityEmpty: Strength, reuse, and age indicators will be computed after decryption pipeline is implemented.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Security, preferences, backup, and trust controls for your team vault.

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage master password, auto-lock, and Security Health checks.

masterPassword.title: Change master password
masterPassword.description: Current password is verified, then all credentials are re-encrypted with the new derived key.

errors.invalidRotationData: Could not prepare key rotation data.
errors.rotationDataMismatch: Vault data changed during rotation. Refresh and try again.
errors.unexpected: Unexpected error while changing master password.

autoLock.title: Auto-lock
autoLock.description: Lock behavior is applied on this device and resets on activity.
autoLock.lockedToast: Vault locked due to auto-lock policy.

health.title: Security Health
health.description: Practical risk indicators across credentials while vault is unlocked.

issuesDescriptions.reused: The same password appears across multiple credentials.
issuesDescriptions.weak: These passwords are easier to guess and should be rotated.
issuesDescriptions.stale: These credentials have not been updated in a long time.
issuesDescriptions.missingUrl: Missing login URLs slows down access and verification.
issuesDescriptions.missingNotes: Missing notes can reduce context for secure team handoff.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Customize language, theme, vault view, and generator defaults.

data.title: Data & Backup
data.description: Export decrypted data only when necessary and store it securely.

export.warningDescription: This file will contain sensitive data. Store it securely and delete it after use.
export.confirmDescription: You are about to export decrypted vault credentials.

about.title: About
about.description: Trust and operational cues for this vault session.

cues.neverUnlocked: No unlock timestamp recorded in this session.
